name: Redemption of Unused or Spoiled Internal Revenue Stamps

eligibility.description: The claim must be presented within 3 years after the purchase of the stamps from the Government and requires satisfactory evidence of the stamps' destruction or uselessness.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can receive a refund or replacement for internal revenue stamps that have been spoiled, destroyed, rendered useless, or for which the owner has no further use.
